calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salceda.
Arnold W. Evje II, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Carlos Mendez Hernandez, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jonathan Bradford.
Exh. 1 - Threeday Notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Jonathan Bradford as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 520 S. Van Ness Ave., #330, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $2,584.90
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $195.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2006 Off Calendar
